prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-B10GRGTGP-10-BLCK-5 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Pan with Ridge Riffles for Gold Panning Paydirt, 10 inch, Black Description: Trap gold with the ASR Outdoor gold prospecting finishing gold pan.

An essential piece of gold prospecting equipment for beginners and adults is the gold pan. This finishing gold pan features a ridge riffle along the outer sidewall for fast and effective gold panning. When you add water over your raw paydirt, the lighter material flows out of the gold pan with the heavier material sitting in the wide textured bottom of the pan allowing for efficient separation of any remaining black sand while highlighting the fine gold in the basin. This is a extremely light weight and yet very tough gold pan that reduces fatigue in your arms, so you will not get as tired compared to using a steel gold pan.

This gold pan will surely hold up to years of prospecting which can also be used for prospecting and testing other deposits of heavy minerals.

Available in 10 inch and 14 inch sizes. Gold prospecting pans are available in green or black gold pans. Search Terms: beginner gold prospecting equipment tools paydirt recovery supplies flake nugget high dredge banker pan for kids gift dad camping hiking mineral pay dirt Features: - RIDGE RIFFLE SIDEWALL - Gold pan incorporates a traditional ridge riffle along the sidewall of the gold prospecting pan which enables the prospector trap gold flake and mineral deposits while washing your raw paydirt material - TRIED AND TRUE - Gold panning with a simple ridge riffle has been proven to collect fine gold. Used for gold prospecting and testing of deposits of heavy minerals; this style of gold pan is commonly used during the final clean up process - HIGHLY EFFICIENT - Maximize your gold recovery from the high contrast color which improves visibility of fine gold flakes against the UV resistant plastic this pan is made from; color will not fade - SPECIFICATIONS - Diameter 10 inch gold pan with 2 Ridges | Depth 2 inches | Weight 4oz - LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - Easy to use and ideal for internediate and beginner gold panning, this gold pan is lighter than traditional steel gold pans allowing for more raw paydirt to be washed without becoming fatigued === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10 inch Black Gold Pan with Ridge Riffles

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ridge Riffle Sidewall, Lightweight Plastic, High Contrast Color, Fine Gold Recovery, Beginner And Intermediate Gold Panning

openai.title_differentiation: Ridge Riffle Sidewall, Lightweight UV Resistant Plastic, Fine Gold Recovery, Beginner Friendly, 2 Ridges
